stemHtml: In a modern transport aircraft, which types of systems are typically supplied with AC electrical power?

options.a: Fuel pumps, hydraulic pumps, wing anti-ice valves and avionics.
options.b: Avionics computers FADEC and flight control computers.
options.c: Air-conditioning packs, galley equipment, heating/cooling fans and large motor loads.
options.d: Navigation and communication radios, interior lighting and emergency lighting.
